name: livekit-rnnoise-processor
description: A WebAssembly module implementing the RNNoise noise suppression library for livekit typescript.

scripts.build:dockerimage: docker image inspect -f '.' emscripten-autotools-4.0.23 || docker build -t emscripten-autotools-4.0.23 .
scripts.build:rnnoise: pnpm run build:dockerimage && pnpm run build:emscripten
scripts.build:worklet: pnpm run build:rnnoise && cd worklet && rollup -c && cd .. && cp worklet/dist/rnnoise.wasm dist/rnnoise.wasm
